|desc={{p|Morpeko}} is Marnie's first known Pokémon. It was first seen helping move a boulder blocking the way to [[Turffield]].

|width=75

|giga=yes
|stage1=Morgrem
|type1=Dark
|type2=Fairy
|img=Marnie Morgrem Adventures.png
|img_size=120px
|cap=Marnie's Morgrem
|img2=Marnie {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Grimmsnarl|1=Gigantamax Grimmsnarl}} Adventures.png
|cap2=Marnie's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Grimmsnarl|1=Gigantamax Grimmsnarl}}
|img2_size=120px
|gender=male
|epnum=PASS28
|epname=Splash!! The Return of the Two Pokémon
|desc={{p|Grimmsnarl}} is Marnie's third known Pokémon. He was first seen as a {{p|Morgrem}}, where he was used to battle {{p|Eternatus}} on the Tower Summit. Later, at the [[Crown Tundra]], he was used to battle [[Peony]]'s {{p|Copperajah}}. By evolving into Grimmsnarl, he was able to win the battle with a powerful {{m|Hammer Arm}}. At the [[Galar League|Champion Cup]] semi-finals, he was [[Gigantamax]]ed to face Hop's {{p|Dubwool}}.

Grimmsnarl's only known move is {{m|Hammer Arm}}.}}

|desc=Marnie, [[Bede]], and [[Hop]] caught {{p|Regirock}}, {{p|Regice}}, and {{p|Registeel}} in the Crown Tundra while searching for the [[Rusted Sword]] and [[Rusted Shield]]. It was never specified who caught each giant, but they entrusted the three Pokémon to [[Peony]] so they could continue searching for the legendary gear.

None of their moves are known.}}
